description: Sector overlay for agricultural producers, exporters, processors, grain handlers, importers, and related agribusiness documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/provincial/territorial legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Safe Food for Canadians Regulations preventive food safety controls
Plant import procedures under the Plant Protection Act
Animal and animal-product import permit guidance
Pest Control Products Act and pesticide compliance guidance

rules.title: Preventive food safety controls or PCP evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Safe Food for Canadians preventive control, PCP, food licence, traceability, import/export food controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Safe Food for Canadians Regulations / CFIA guidance

rules.title: Plant import or phytosanitary control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CFIA plant import permits, phytosanitary certificates, plant protection, or pest-control import conditions.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Plant Protection Act / CFIA plant import guidance

rules.title: Animal health import permit or zoosanitary evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for animal health import permit, zoosanitary certificate, live animal, animal product, or by-product control evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Health of Animals Regulations / CFIA animal import guidance

rules.title: Canadian Grain Commission licence or grain-dealer compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for grain dealer licence, elevator licence, producer payment protection, or Canadian Grain Commission evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Canada Grain Act / Canadian Grain Commission licensing guidance

rules.title: Pesticide registration, import, or label-use evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Health Canada/PMRA pesticide registration, import, distribution, or label-compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
